method: 8-agent classification workflow over 144 defined functions; one batch (18 fns) re-classified by hand after a subagent session-limit; borderline OD-accessor twins resolved by inspection

vanmoof.name: power_pedal_log_event
vanmoof.role: 30-byte event-record emitter; publishes via message-buffer send to *(*ctx+0x590); src_tag@0, code@4 (u16), argc body words@6; single-deref null guard. == elock/eshifter/frontlight/rearlight log_event.

vanmoof.name: power_pedal_od_signal_register
vanmoof.role: Reads NVM blob 0x30 (14 B), validity gate (staging[0] > 1), registers OD descriptor 0x87 (secret); 13-byte body copy. nvm_record_read is 4-arg (handle, buf, blob_id, len).

vanmoof.name: power_pedal_od_signal_register_91
vanmoof.role: Reads NVM blob 0x40 (16 B), registers OD descriptor 0x91 (key); 16-byte body copy. == elock_load_aeskey_to_od_91.

vanmoof.name: power_pedal_od_signal_8808_send
vanmoof.role: Builds OD descriptor 0x8808, lookup/wait(100)/2-word copy/re-lookup/send/release. == elock/rearlight od_signal_8808_send.

deferred.name: main_init
deferred.note: Monolithic SDK bring-up + FreeRTOS task creation + CAN-OD signal registration (0x42ac-0x53f7), ends in reset loop.

deferred.name: app_init_task
deferred.note: Large (~58 KB decompile) VanMoof app-init/task orchestrator: 26 mallocs + OD-signal registration + 15 log_event calls; alloc/register/log glue, deferred like the light task bodies.

deferred.name: od_value_accessor_get
deferred.note: Generic OD-framework flag-clear + tail-call handler at +0x10 trampoline.

deferred.name: od_value_accessor_set
deferred.note: Twin of 0x588c (clears flag byte 1 instead of 0).
